top_signals.title: Statement by President von der Leyen with Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Brussels, 29 May 2026 Prime Minister Magyar, dear Péter,
A very warm welcome to Brussels. The 12 April will stay in our memory for a very long time. On that day, the Hungarian people...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to US Help
top_signals.summary: Shipowners are increasingly optimistic about a pickup in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz after more vessels left the waterway this week with the US providing information to aid those making the journey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US general holds rare meeting with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay
top_signals.summary: The meeting is the first in recent memory by a head of U.S. Southern Command and comes amid growing concerns in Cuba of a possible U.S. military attack.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Berkshire trails red-hot S&P 500 by biggest margin so far this year
top_signals.summary: Berkshire's widely held B shares are now running 16.3 percentage points behind the benchmark index year-to-date, the biggest gap so far in 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
